channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising Home Prices in Canada Outpace Median Incomes, Limiting Affordability
item.description: Over the past few decades, housing affordability in Canada has deteriorated significantly. Thirty years ago, it was feasible for people earning moderate incomes, such as grocery store managers or part...

item.title: Danny de Bruyne returns found ring to rightful owner while promoting ethical metal detecting
item.description: Danny de Bruyne, known for his role on Scandal!, has a passion beyond acting: searching South African parks and open land with a metal detector for historic artefacts. Recently, he found a gold ring i...

item.title: Top DJs and Artists to Headline 2026 &FRIENDS Festival
item.description: The highly anticipated &FRIENDS Festival is set to feature some of the biggest names in electronic dance music. Galantis, Porter Robinson, Alan Shirahama, and Ian Asher are among the star-studded line...

item.title: ANC faces potential decline in support ahead of local government elections
item.description: Political analysts warn that the African National Congress (ANC) could see further erosion of its support in the upcoming local government elections scheduled for 4 November 2026. The entry of the uMk...

item.title: Islamabad Police Reviews Security at Mosques and Imambargahs, Finds Gaps
item.description: ISLAMABAD: The Islamabad Capital Police have expressed serious concerns over the security arrangements at places of worship, particularly during Friday prayers. Inspector General of Police Syed Ali Na...

item.title: Children's Author Sally Gardner Reveals Prescription Drugs Triggered Compulsive Shopping
item.description: Sally Gardner, a best-selling children's author and Carnegie Medal winner, has shared her struggle with compulsive shopping triggered by prescription medication. Gardner was prescribed dopamine agonis...

item.title: Purity Ngirici Comments on Removal from Kenya Seed Company Board
item.description: Former Kirinyaga Woman Representative, Purity Wangui Ngirici, has broken her silence after being abruptly removed from the Kenya Seed Company Limited board. The move came after Treasury CS John Mbadi ...

item.title: Kavitha Criticises BRS Policies, Outlines New Party Focus on Women and Welfare
item.description: Telangana Rakshana Sena president Kalvakuntla Kavitha has strongly criticised the policies of the previous Bharat Rashtra Samithi (BRS) government, led by her father K Chandrasekhar Rao, asserting tha...

item.title: Cherie DeVaux Makes History as Trainer of Kentucky Derby Winner Golden Tempo
item.description: Golden Tempo triumphed in the Kentucky Derby, marking a historic milestone as Cherie DeVaux became the first woman to train the winner of the opening leg of the Triple Crown. The race, covering 1 1/8 ...

item.title: Lyon Defeat Arsenal 4-3 on Aggregate to Reach Women’s Champions League Final
item.description: Lyon don secure their place for the final of the Women’s Champions League after dem beat Arsenal on aggregate. For the second leg at Groupama Stadium, German forward Jule Brand score the winning goal ...

item.title: Man found guilty of attempting terror attack on Israeli embassy in London
item.description: Abdullah Albadri, a 34-year-old failed asylum seeker from Kuwait, was convicted of preparing an act of terrorism after attempting to enter Israel's embassy in London armed with two knives. His actions...

item.title: Former DDG cleared of charges seeks compensation for legal costs
item.description: Nelly Letsholonyane, a former deputy director-general in the Human Settlements Department, has launched a claim against the department for unfair labour practice following a protracted legal battle th...

item.title: Ottawa Charge tie playoff series against Boston Fleet with strong goaltending
item.description: In an intense National Women's Hockey League playoff matchup, the Ottawa Charge secured a 3-1 victory over the Boston Fleet on Saturday night at the Tsongas Center in Lowell, Massachusetts. Goaltender...

item.title: Father Reunites with Son Missing for Over a Year After Television Tip
item.description: In a heartwarming story that has brought relief to many, Martin Ochieng' was reunited with his son, Jordan Augustine Omuse, who went missing in March 2025 during the Kawempe North by-election chaos. T...

item.title: JPMorgan Executive Faces Allegations of Sexual Misconduct Amid Scandal
item.description: A controversy has erupted surrounding JPMorgan after a Manhattan bank executive, Lorna Hajdini, was accused of sexual harassment and assault by a male colleague, Chirayu Rana. The allegations have ign...

item.title: Nashik court rejects anticipatory bail of woman accused in TCS BPO harassment and conversion case
item.description: A sessions court in Nashik has refused to grant anticipatory bail to a woman employee of Tata Consultancy Services (TCS) who is facing serious allegations of sexual harassment and religious coercion a...

item.title: Clinical Trial Finds Low-Fat Vegan Diet Significantly Reduces Greenhouse Gas Emissions and Supports Health
item.description: A recent 12-week randomized clinical trial led by Dr. Hana Kahleova examined the effects of a low-fat vegan diet on adults with type 1 diabetes. The study found that participants who adopted a plant-b...

item.title: Foreign investors pull out from Pakistan’s Treasury Bills amid Middle East war
item.description: Foreign investors have almost completely left Pakistan’s Treasury Bills, with over 94 percent of their investment in T‑bills exiting the country by April 17, according to State Bank of Pakistan data. ...

item.title: Discovery of a 275-Million-Year-Old Stem Tetrapod with Unique Twisted Jaw
item.description: Paleontologists in Brazil have uncovered fossilized jawbones from a previously unknown species dating back 275 million years, named Tanyka amnicola. Found in a dry riverbed in the Amazon, the discover...

item.title: Fire destroys marine science laboratory building at University of South Florida St. Petersburg campus
item.description: A large fire broke out on Saturday afternoon at the University of South Florida’s St. Petersburg campus, severely damaging the Marine Science Laboratory building. Campus police reported that emergency...
